subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou Who by Thy Name hast illumined the world and subdued the nations! I beseech Thee by the Most Great Name through which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک نورت العالم و سخرت الامم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @prayer for protection, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
